title: Rich Indulgent Mexican Beans Tacos
description: A jammy, gooey, indulgent Mexican dish featuring black cardamom pods and miso-marinate, this recipe is a macrobiotic-friendly twist on traditional tacos. It combines the deep flavors of Chiapan cuisine with modern twists.
instructions: Start by cooking the black beans according to package instructions or from scratch if using dried beans.
In a blender or food processor, combine miso paste, crushed black cardamom pods, lime juice, and a pinch of salt and pepper to make the miso-marinate.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat and add diced red onion, cooking until it is translucent.
Add the cooked black beans to the skillet with the onion and stir in the miso-marinate, letting it simmer for a few minutes to combine flavors.
Warm the corn tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the tacos by spooning the bean mixture onto a tortilla and topping with chopped cilantro.
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste if necessary.
